title: Bulenox vs Tradeify (2026): Same Lock, Opposite Everything Else
description: Bulenox vs Tradeify — same SB+$100 lock archetype, same 40% consistency family, but opposite platforms, opposite program rigidity, opposite consistency scope. Honest 2026 side-by-side.

og.title: Bulenox vs Tradeify (2026): Same Lock, Opposite Everything Else
og.description: Both lock at SB+$100. Both use a 40% consistency rule somewhere. Everything else — platform stack, program rigidity, phase structure, payouts — is opposite. Here's how to pick.
